tasks.label: 🚀 Start Backend + Flutter Web
tasks.command: cd /d "d:\my code\daily routine" && docker-compose up -d && cd flutter_app && flutter pub get && flutter run -d chrome --web-port 8080

tasks.label: تشغيل مصاريفي
tasks.command: cd backend && (if not exist venv\Scripts\python.exe python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -q fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" "sqlalchemy[asyncio]" aiosqlite "pydantic[email]" pydantic-settings python-dotenv "python-jose[cryptography]" "passlib[bcrypt]" python-multipart openai httpx aiofiles python-dateutil && set DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./masareefi.db && set SECRET_KEY=local-dev-secret && set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-placeholder && venv\Scripts\uvicorn.exe app.main:app --port 8000

tasks.label: Start Masareefi Server
tasks.command: cd backend && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -q "pydantic[email]" && set DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./masareefi.db && set SECRET_KEY=abc123 && set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-placeholder && venv\Scripts\uvicorn.exe app.main:app --port 8000

tasks.label: masareefi-run
tasks.command: d:\my code\daily routine\backend\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -q pydantic[email] & set DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./masareefi.db& set SECRET_KEY=abc123& set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-placeholder& cd /d "d:\my code\daily routine\backend"& "d:\my code\daily routine\backend\venv\Scripts\uvicorn.exe" app.main:app --port 8000
